problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Topological insulator surface state conduction is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
